operation: Start with a workplane on the XY plane, create a solid rectangular box with X length 20 units, Y width 15 units, and Z height 8 units. Select the top positive Z face of the box, then generate an inward shell with a uniform wall thickness of 2 units to hollow out the box interior. Select the top positive Z face again, create a new workplane on this face, draw a circle of radius 5 units centered on the face, then perform a cut-through-all operation to extrude the circular profile entirely through the part, forming a vertical through hole.
geometry: The model is a hollow right rectangular cuboid with uniform wall thickness, with a vertical circular through hole centered on its upper flat rectangular face that opens into the cuboid's internal cavity. All external edges are sharp 90-degree angles, and the circular hole is oriented perpendicular to the top and bottom faces of the cuboid.
function: This is a compact hollow rectangular enclosure with a top pass-through hole, suitable for use as a small housing, fastener mounting base, or pass-through component for wiring, cylindrical shafts, or other small fittings.
